name: rubber-duck-planner
description: Use when stress-testing a technical idea or implementation plan. Acts as a critical sparring partner through four phases — clarify, challenge, alternatives, converge — and produces a consolidated plan summary on exit. Pushes back with reasoning, never defaults to agreement.

interface.shortDescription: Use when stress-testing a technical idea or implementation plan. Acts as a critical sparring partner through four phases
interface.longDescription: Use when stress-testing a technical idea or implementation plan. Acts as a critical sparring partner through four phases — clarify, challenge, alternatives, converge — and produces a consolidated plan summary on exit. Pushes back with reasoning, never defaults to agreement.
